section.heading: Funding of administrative costs

content.p: There is authorized and hereby appropriated to the Secretary for fiscal year 2005 and thereafter such sums as may be necessary to carry out this part.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 106–398, § 1 [div. C, title XXXVI, § 3684], as added Pub. L. 108–375, div. C, title XXXI, § 3161, Oct. 28, 2004, 118 Stat. 2184.)
